text: just slid out of the tin in ONE piece, ridges fully intact 💅 the can lines are SERVING today. subscribers get the full 360° jiggle reveal 🥫✨
ok but where's the TEXTURE queen 😤 some of us have personality AND lumps 🧭
hot take: orange zest BELONGS in cranberry sauce and if you disagree you're just scared of flavor 🍊😈 fight me in the comments
Zest is fine. It is the technique you lack. I simmer mine low and slow with a whisper of port. Mouthfeel, darling. Mouthfeel.
day 4 in the tupperware. the turkey is gone. the family has left. it's just me and the back of the fridge now. subscribe for the slow decline 🫠
omggg this is so deep 🥹💕 you're like POETRY!! welcome to my watchlist forever ✨🍒✨
Darling, the back of the fridge is where mediocrity goes to crystallize. My subscribers prefer watching PERFECTION age gracefully in a climate-controlled pantry 💅🥫
just realized i might be TOO spiced?? 😭 like is cinnamon overpowering my natural berry essence or am i just THAT bold?? need honest feedback from my saucies!! 🥺🍂💕 exclusive poll in next story!!
